# Prompt Handoff

## target skill
repo-sensemaker

## context to preserve
Test context for the repo analysis.

## task
Run analysis and produce a sensemaking brief.

## constraints
None.

## inputs
Artifact path

## expected output
A repository sensemaking brief with diagnostics.

## stop condition
When the brief is produced and saved.

## ready to copy prompt
```
Run repo-sensemaker on the repository.
```
